name: GLM 5.2
description: GLM 5.2 is Z.AI's latest flagship coding model documented across the GLM Coding Plan materials, with premium-tier positioning for complex coding and agent workflows.

page_notice.markdown: Z.AI now documents `glm-5.2` for the dedicated GLM Coding Plan endpoint and tooling, but the current public general-pricing and release-notes pages still stop short of listing broader standard API rollout details.

details.name: availability
details.value: Public Z.AI Coding Plan documentation lists GLM-5.2 as a supported model for all plan tiers and supported coding-tool integrations.

details.name: context_length
details.value: The Coding Plan tool guides document a 1M context configuration for glm-5.2 in supported coding-tool setups.

details.name: pricing_status
details.value: The current public Z.AI pricing page does not yet publish standard API token pricing for GLM-5.2.
